description_long: This bungalow features a single-story rectangular layout with a flat roof and a prominent front entrance accessed by a tiled walkway. The exterior walls are finished in a medium gray texture, while the interior is divided into several rooms, including a visible kitchen area with cabinetry and appliances. Large windows are present on some walls, providing natural light to the interior spaces. The structure includes a main living area, bedrooms, and utility spaces, all arranged for efficient use of space. The front entrance is accentuated by a small porch-like extension, and the overall design is modern and functional. The building sits low to the ground, typical of urban residential bungalows.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, gray exterior walls, and a tiled front walkway. The layout includes multiple rooms, large windows, and a prominent front entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, tiled walkway, and partial interior room divisions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, visible windows, and interior kitchen area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back rooms and a clear view of the kitchen and cabinetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional room divisions and the rear exit area.
